goal: Inspect the workspace, run tests, fix failing code if needed, and produce a concise final report.

steps.reason: Check the project structure and identify likely sources of test failures.
Execute the test suite to confirm failures and validate behavior.
If tests fail, update the relevant source file(s) with the minimal fix.
Rerun tests to verify the fix and ensure everything passes.
Summarize what was found, what was changed, and the final test status.

done_when: Workspace structure and failing code are identified
All tests pass after any needed fix
A final report with changes and test results is produced
